# ANALYSIS: BASELINE_OOS_REALFILLS_VALIDATION

**Filed:** 2026-06-08  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** quality_gate  
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

We hypothesize that the baseline parameters (vol_mult=1.1, tp1=0.4, runner=3.0) will show positive edge capture on the OOS period (2025-07-01 to 2026-06-30) and will correctly capture the J anchor days (4/29, 5/01, 5/04) as winners and avoid or minimize losses on the J loser days (5/05, 5/06, 5/07) when evaluated with real-fills.

## Mechanism

We will run a walk-forward out-of-sample (OOS) backtest from 2025-07-01 to 2026-06-30 using the baseline parameters. Then, we will evaluate the real-fills (using realistic OPRA simulation) on the three J winner days (4/29, 5/01, 5/04) to compare the baseline engine behavior with real-market execution.

## OP-20 disclosures

Note: This is an analysis of the baseline parameters, not a candidate proposal. Therefore, OP-20 disclosures are not required per se. However, for transparency:

1. **Account-size assumption:** The baseline parameters are designed for an account size of $25K+ (qty=28 requires $25K+; $1K paper ~= 14% headline). The OOS walk-forward and real-fills will be run assuming the same position sizing as the baseline.
2. **Sample bias:** The OOS period is 2025-07-01 to 2026-06-30 (12 months). Selection method: time-based holdout. Overfit risk: mitigated by walk-forward procedure (if implemented) but we are running a single OOS window.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (we are about to run it)
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (we are about to run it)
5. **Failure modes:** Worst day: unknown until backtest; max drawdown: unknown; blow-up scenario: unknown.
6. **Concentration:** unknown until backtest.

## Pre-merge gate

Gym validators: 67/67 PASS (as per the baseline)  
Walk-forward: OOS period must show positive edge capture and a Sharpe ratio > 0.  
Real-fills: On the top 3 J days, the real-fill P&L must be within ±20% of the simulator P&L.

## Confidence

5 / 10 -- We are basing this on the assumption that the baseline has been profitable in-sample, but we have not yet validated OOS or real-fills.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

This analysis does not propose a change to the strategy. It is a validation of the current baseline. Therefore, it does not conflict with any existing candidate. It complements the leaderboard by providing an updated validation of the baseline parameters.
